Supplemental Motion To Seal (Medical Privacy) ***Redacted***
Off Calendar Sep-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Afra Berger 628-226-7515 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

ARGUED. Ms. Berger presents arguments; harrassment, hostile work environment, hipaa, medical information. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF AFRA BERGER's Motion To Seal (Medical Privacy) ***Redacted***.

Plaintiff Afra Berger's unopposed Supplemental Motion To Seal (Medical Privacy) is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

** Unredacted ** Notice Of Application & Application To
Seal Court Records In Dismissed Employment Case; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Afra Berger 628-226-7515 dna@berger.bar Plaintiff in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

ARGUED. Ms Berger contests the tentative ruling and requests name to be redacted. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Afra Berger's unopposed Motion to Seal Court Records in Dismissed Employment Case is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
